rationale: Article VIII, §19 governs exemptions for farm products, livestock, poultry, and family supplies — not residence homestead exemptions. It imposes no constraint on the proposed homestead exemption increase.
quote: Farm products, livestock, and poultry in the hands of the producer, and family supplies for home and farm use, are exempt from all taxation until otherwise directed by a two-thirds vote of all the members elect to both houses of the Legislature.
_note: The cited constitutional provision is inapposite to residence homestead exemptions; the relevant provision would be Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b.
